ability.infinity.gauntlet.endosym_gauntl: Unlock by right-clicking with an Endosymbiotic Ingot in your main hand. A living, adaptive gauntlet skin.
ability.infinity.gauntlet.fantastic_four: Unlock by right-clicking with an unknown item. A special skin inspired by the Fantastic Four.
ability.infinity.gauntlet.finger_gauntle: Unlock by holding a piece of raw chicken. A questionable gauntlet variant that is, quite literally, finger-lickin’ good.
ability.infinity.gauntlet.hand_of_terror: Unlock by right-clicking with an object that still holds remnants of power. A custom gauntlet skin requested by Terror.
Unlock by right-clicking with a Vibranium Flux Capacitor in your main hand. Equip this skin and keep it on for one full in-game day to heal the burn damage caused by the Snap.
ability.infinity.gauntlet.netherite_gaun: Unlock by right-clicking with a Netherite Ingot in your main hand. Applies a reinforced Netherite Gauntlet skin.
ability.infinity.gauntlet.normal_gauntle: Removes the currently applied gauntlet skin and restores the original Infinity Gauntlet. Any consumed unlock items will be returned.
ability.infinity.gauntlet.offhand_desc.d: For best results, equip the Infinity Gauntlet in the Hands Curios slot or the offhand. Using the main hand may limit functionality. The gauntlet will not be visible in first person when placed in the offhand.
ability.infinity.gauntlet.omni_desc.desc: Equipping both the Prototype Omnitrix from Alien Evo and the Infinity Gauntlet grants access to a special Omni-Gauntlet skin that improves Omnitrix usability.
Unlock by right-clicking with Cherry Planks in your main hand. A refined Rose-Gold styled gauntlet.
Unlock by right-clicking with an Uru Ingot in your main hand. A gauntlet forged with dark influence.
ability.infinity.gauntlet.snap_desc.desc: After performing the Snap, you will be severely weakened and burned. Your health is reduced to half a heart, and several stone abilities are disabled. You must wait one full in-game day before snapping again. Equip the Nano Gauntlet skin to heal the burn damage.
ability.infinity.gauntlet.soul_netherite: Unlock by right-clicking with a Soul-Infused Netherite Ingot in your main hand. A darker, more powerful evolution of the Netherite Gauntlet.
ability.infinity.mind_stone.flight.descr: Grants you the power of flight. This ability can be toggled on or off if you wish to use another form of flight.
ability.infinity.mind_stone.hero.descrip: Your presence inspires admiration and trust. Villagers see you as a true hero.
ability.infinity.mind_stone.intangibilit: Allows you to phase through blocks and entities, becoming untouchable to the physical world.
ability.infinity.mind_stone.night_vision: Enhances your perception, allowing you to see clearly even in complete darkness.
ability.infinity.mind_stone.passive.desc: Pacifies hostile mobs around you, causing them to become peaceful. Sneak while activating to undo the effect.
Fires a concentrated energy beam from the Scepter, dealing massive damage to whatever it strikes.
ability.infinity.mind_stone.recipe.descr: Floods your mind with infinite knowledge, unlocking access to every crafting recipe.
ability.infinity.mind_stone.remove_mind_: Safely removes the Mind Stone from the Scepter and returns it to your possession.
ability.infinity.mind_stone.un_passive.d: Removes pacification from nearby hostile mobs, restoring their aggression.
ability.infinity.power_stone.explosion.d: Without protection, the player is bombarded with cosmic radiation, destroying the environment and user in the process.
The player used to be bombarded with cosmic radiation, destroying the environment and user in the process, but it can now be controlled.
ability.infinity.power_stone.impower.des: It gives the player both health boost and resistance
ability.infinity.power_stone.knockback.d: It grants the player knockback resistance
ability.infinity.power_stone.meteor_stor: The Power Stone shatters a distant moon, while the Space Stone pulls the fragments toward the target. Using them together creates a devastating, large-scale attack that requires both stones. (Don't spam, it might cause lag)
ability.infinity.power_stone.power_blast: A powerful beam that gets stronger the more punch upgrade you unlock. It has a range of 100 blocks, smelts blocks and causes fire. It will turn rainbow and do explosion damage if all 6 stones are collected. Does not work with other suits, only the gauntlet.
ability.infinity.power_stone.punch.descr: It grants the player 30 attack damage
ability.infinity.power_stone.punch2.desc: It grants the player 70 attack damage
ability.infinity.power_stone.punch3.desc: It grants the player 100 attack damage
ability.infinity.power_stone.punch4.desc: It grants the player 300 attack damage
ability.infinity.power_stone.punch5.desc: It grants the player 3000 attack damage
ability.infinity.power_stone.punch6.desc: It grants the player a near infinite attack damage
ability.infinity.reality_stone.bubble.de: Turns the block you look at into bubbles (stand ~2 blocks away)
ability.infinity.reality_stone.effects.d: Gives entities nearby blindness, nausea, darkness and slowness
ability.infinity.reality_stone.normal.de: Returns the player to normal scale
ability.infinity.reality_stone.remove_re: Removes the Reality Stone and returns it to your possession
ability.infinity.reality_stone.save_dumm: Any block you look at gets added to your inventory
ability.infinity.reality_stone.shrink_du: Allows for size changing, press to shrink, shift press to grow, press again to return to original size
ability.infinity.soul_stone.effect_immun: Gives you immunity to most negative effects
ability.infinity.soul_stone.enter_soulwo: Lets you, and nearby entities, enter the SoulWorld. Shift to exit
ability.infinity.soul_stone.exit_soulwor: Lets you, and nearby entities, exit the SoulWorld
ability.infinity.soul_stone.immortal.des: Makes you completely immortal. Requires all stones to be inserted
ability.infinity.soul_stone.locateplayer: Use the locateplayer command: locateplayer <entity_name>. Designed for players, but works with named entities
ability.infinity.soul_stone.summon_zombi: Summons 7 Zombies. Can pair with the Mind Stone's pacify ability to create a strong army
ability.infinity.space_stone.black_hole_: Creates a devastating black hole that consumes entities and blocks. Requires the Power Stone
ability.infinity.space_stone.force_field: Creates an impenetrable force field that makes you invulnerable but unable to move
ability.infinity.space_stone.remove_spac: Extracts the Space Stone from the Tesseract
ability.infinity.space_stone.step_assist: Allows you to step up full blocks without jumping
ability.infinity.space_stone.telekinesis: Use telekinesis to grab, move, and damage entities from a distance
ability.infinity.space_stone.teleport.de: Teleport to wherever you are looking
ability.infinity.time_stone.accelerate_t: Accelerates the passage of time, causing the world to move faster than normal.
ability.infinity.time_stone.projectile_s: Stops all projectiles in midair. Once you leave the area, they will eventually regain momentum.
ability.infinity.time_stone.remove_time_: Removes the Time Stone from the Eye of Agamotto. (Shift Left Click from Eye of Agamotto)
ability.infinity.time_stone.reset_time_s: Resets the flow of time back to its natural state.
ability.infinity.time_stone.slow_time_du: Manipulate the flow of time by scrolling forward or backward. The sidebar indicates how fast or slow time is flowing, with the center representing normal speed.
ability.infinity.time_stone.stop_time.de: Stops the daylight cycle entirely until reactivated.
ability.infinity.time_stone.time_freeze_: Completely halts time. Press once to freeze time, and again to resume it.
ability.infinity.time_stone.time_set.des: Grants access to the time_set command, allowing direct control over the world's time.
